prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名从2021年第100名持续上升至2026年第79名，近年排名稳步提升；抖音综合热度排名第80位（评价一般），近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；民族学A+（全国顶尖）、中国语言文学A-、社会学A-，虽为民族类院校特色学科，但对物理类考生直接吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等物理类热门专业社会热度持续高热推荐，报考竞争激烈；河北省2026年物理类考生约36.5万人，较2025年微增约0.4%；省控线（物理类本科批）从2021年412分持续上升至2025年459分，反映整体竞争加剧；中央民族大学位于北京，与河北相邻，对河北考生具有天然的地域吸引力；该校在河北招生占比约3%（2025年），属中等偏上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15775名、2026年缩招约9.1%、省控线持续上升及物理类热门专业高热推荐等因素，预计竞争较2025年有所加剧；预测最低位次约14965名，区间14465–15465名。

一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息工程、通信工程、人工智能）
- 法学类（含法学、法学（涉外法治））。

- 统计学类（含统计学、应用统计学）
- 信息与计算科学
- 经济学类（含经济学、财政学、金融学、国际经济与贸易）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间14465–15465名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如14465名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、电子信息类等热门一档专业；位次接近区间上限（15465名附近）应以三档保底为主，兼顾二档中等专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9711 → 10996 → 15687 → 15950 → 15775, with a continuous backward shift of about 6000 places from 2021 to 2023, and stabilization in the 15700–16000 range in 2024–2025; the 2025 baseline is about 15775; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 37 in 2021, 113 in 2022, 111 in 2023, 110 in 2024, and 110 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 100, a reduction of about 9.1% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; its ranking on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has risen continuously from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, showing steady improvement in recent years; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 80th (average evaluation), with stable reputation in recent years and no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Ethnology A+ (top nationally), Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, though these are characteristic disciplines of an ethnic university, they have limited direct appeal to Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors in Physics Category such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended with intense competition; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 365,000, a slight increase of about 0.4% from 2025; the provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) has risen continuously from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, reflecting overall intensifying competition; Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, adjacent to Hebei, offering natural geographical appeal to Hebei candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Hebei is about 3% (2025), at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15775, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 9.1%, the continuous rise in the provincial control line, and the high recommendation of popular Physics Category majors, competition is expected to intensify compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 14965, with a range of 14465–15465.

- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Law (including Law, Law (Foreign-related Rule of Law)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering

- Economics (including Economics, Finance, Financial Management, International Economics and Trade).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Nanomaterials and Technology
- Business Administration (including Business Administration, Accounting, Financial Management, Human Resource Management)
- Biological Sciences (including Biological Sciences, Ecology)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (including Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science, Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 14465–15465, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 14465) can prioritize competitive Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (around 15465) should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1161 → 1359 → 2331 → 1919 → 2071, showing an overall backward trend, with a significant fluctuation in 2023 (2331), and fluctuating in the 1900–2100 range in recent two years; the baseline for 2025 is about 2071; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province was 27 in 2021, 49 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 59 in 2024, and 60 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 66, an increase of 10% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; the main ranking of Chinese universities by Shanghai Ranking has continuously risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years; the comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 80th (average evaluation), with stable reputation in recent years, no significant negative public opinion or record of admission gaps; Ethnology is A+ (top in the country), Chinese Language and Literature is A-, Sociology is A-, highly matching the History Category admission majors (Ethnology, Chinese Language and Literature, Sociology, etc.), strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially recommended, while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the number of History Category candidates in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 245,000, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025; the provincial control line (History Category undergraduate batch) has continuously risen from 454 in 2021 to 477 in 2025, reflecting intensified overall competition; Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, adjacent to Hebei, naturally attractive to Hebei candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Hebei is about 3% (2025), at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2071, a 10% enrollment expansion in 2026, the continuous rise of the provincial control line, and the attractiveness of advantageous disciplines to liberal arts candidates, competition is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025 but offset by the expansion; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2225, with a range of 1824–2626.
